thesis: AFTER-HOURS window (~17:00 ET Monday 7/20, generated 2026-07-20T23:44:10Z) — the plan for the NEXT trading day, Tuesday 7/21. STRUCTURE FIRST: an extended, tech-led structural bull is DIGESTING near all-time highs, its one structural crack (MSFT) testing an unconfirmed repair, the leadership index (QQQ) still without a bull-stack, the crowd rotating DEFENSIVE/ENERGY, and vol FIRMING back up into the after-hours read. Persistence counted by distinct COMPLETED daily bars is 7 (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17); 7/17 is the last confirmed bar and today's live Monday 7/20 session is still flagged marketClosed=false / not settled, so it is NOT counted, and intraday reruns are never counted. WHAT CHANGED vs the pre-close read: (1) VIX firmed back to 18.65 (from the pre-close 18.02, roughly flat vs Friday's 18.77 close) — the intraday relenting reversed, vol is low but firm again, still under the 3-point single-reference regime-change threshold. (2) MSFT 402.29 nudged +0.30% ABOVE its 50-day (~401.1) for the first time this reclaim attempt (mom5 +2.89) — but on a LIVE intraday tick, NOT a confirmed daily close, still bear-stacked and -8.01% below its 200-day (~437.3). (3) the momentum/semis complex got HEAVIER, not lighter: SOXX rolled from Basing to Lagging (rsMom1m -13.01, rsMom 98.90 <100, 0/12 up-momentum, 1/12 above the 50-day), SPMO mom5 -3.48, VGT -2.03. WHAT DID NOT: SPY 742.09 stays bull-stacked (20>50>200) but sits -0.18% just UNDER its rising 50-day (~743.4) and -2.05% off the ATH (~757.6) — back on the line, not a held floor; QQQ 696.06 is still TANGLED and -3.13% BELOW its 50-day (~718.6, mom5 -2.20), the reclaim UNWON. The DEFENSIVE/ENERGY rotation is CONFIRMED on this run's fresh RRG (sector read 2026-07-20T20:48:20Z): XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.44>100, accel +2.53 board-best, rsMom 103.02 board-best, +12.89% over its 200-day, rotation into) with real assets leading underneath (real-assets read 13:30Z: BNO 67.7 board leader, USO 62.4 / DBC 66.4 / PDBC 66.6 / DBA 65.6 all Uptrend), XLRE/XLP Leading, while XLF rolled to Peaking (accel -1.30, out) and XLV (accel -2.34, worst) / XLI (accel -1.43) weaken. TACTICAL, last: Friday's monthly OPEX is RESOLVED — dealer gamma has RESET for the new monthly cycle, so any prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing anything off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed for overnight and Tuesday 7/21. PLAN for 7/21: HOLD the bull-stack but do NOT add index beta while SPY is back on its 50-day, QQQ is tangled below its own 50-day and vol firmed; ROTATE toward the confirmed, oil-backed XLE over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, still-heavy semis into any late/opening strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT as it presses its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk overnight hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail after re-verifying the live path.
